nasb.text: your corpses will fall in this wilderness, even all your numbered men, according to your complete number from twenty years old and upward, who have grumbled against Me.

esv.text: your dead bodies shall fall in this wilderness, and of all your number, listed in the census from twenty years old and upward, who have grumbled against me,

cnv.text: 你們的屍體必倒在這曠野；你們中間被數點過的，就是按著你們的數目，從二十歲及以上，向我發過怨言的，

ccb.text: 你们当中凡登记在册、二十岁以上向我发怨言的人，必倒毙在这旷野中，
